name: Duck with Pine Nut Wild Rice
keywords: poultry mexican main dish gamebirds side dish
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the wild rice with green onions, margarine, and chicken broth in a saucepan.
2. Toast the pine nuts separately until golden brown.
3. Add the toasted pine nuts to the wild rice mixture.
4. Cook the duckling as desired (see recipe 2 for instructions).
5. Serve the cooked duck with the pine nut wild rice alongside.
